name: Chocolate Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle sweet granulated sugar substitute over a plate for dusting.
2. Cream together margarine and 2 tablespoons of sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of sugar and the liquid sugar substitute to the creamed mixture. Beat at medium speed for 30 seconds.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa powder, and salt until combined.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring at low speed until just blended.
6. Stir in the chopped nuts and dried raisins. Mix lightly.
7. Form the dough into small balls using 1 tablespoon of dough for each ball.
8. Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with aluminum foil or sprayed with cooking spray.
9. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until slightly firm.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
11. Dust with sweet granulated sugar substitute to coat.
12. Cool to room temperature before serving. Serve 2 balls per serving.
Variation: Chocolate Mint Balls
Add 1/2 teaspoon peppermint extract along with 1 teaspoon vanilla extract instead of the 2 teaspoons vanilla extract.
